name: RPlog_I_Know_She_Cheats_at_Cards
title: A Sore Loser at the Wayside Cantina
summary: Two days after the Wayside Cantina nearly went up in a thermal detonator blast, a sabacc game in the back turns ugly when the Quarren B'ric Toppe loudly accuses the players, including Johanna and Leo, of cheating him out of three thousand credits. As the amorous Whiphid Haihai looks on with his new gelatinous mate and the bounty hunter Ecks slips out back to send a coded distress transmission about a compromised mission and an assassin on his trail, B'ric's temper finally boils over. When he moves to shove Ecks against the wall and Chana intervenes by offering him a drink, the enraged Quarren declares he wants to destroy everyone, prompting Chana to splash her drink in his eyes and deliver a crippling palm strike to his groin. The blow drops B'ric to his knees to the delighted hoots of Johanna and Haihai, and a wary Chana suggests they all pay their tabs and leave before they wear out their welcome.
